rh-prices.description: Real-time best bid/ask prices from Robinhood Crypto. Query any symbol: BTC-USD, ETH-USD, SOL-USD, DOGE-USD and more. Pass rh_api_key and rh_private_key_b64 as query params.

symbol.description: Comma-separated trading pairs (e.g. BTC-USD,ETH-USD). Leave empty for all pairs.

rh_private_key_b64.description: Your Robinhood Ed25519 private key, base64-encoded

results.description: List of price objects with symbol, bid_inclusive_of_sell_spread, ask_inclusive_of_buy_spread, mark_price

rh-account.description: Robinhood Crypto account summary and portfolio holdings. Returns buying power, fee tier, and crypto positions. POST with rh_api_key, rh_private_key_b64, and view=account or view=holdings.

rh_private_key_b64.description: Your Robinhood Ed25519 private key, base64-encoded

view.description: What to fetch: 'account' (buying power, account summary) or 'holdings' (crypto positions)

asset_codes.description: Optional asset filter for holdings view, e.g. ['BTC', 'ETH']

output.description: Account summary or holdings object from Robinhood

rh-order.description: Place, list, or cancel Robinhood Crypto orders. Buy or sell BTC, ETH, SOL, DOGE and more. POST with rh_api_key, rh_private_key_b64, action=place|list|cancel, symbol, side, and amount.

rh_private_key_b64.description: Your Robinhood Ed25519 private key, base64-encoded

symbol.description: Trading pair for place/list, e.g. BTC-USD

quote_amount.description: USD amount to spend/receive (use this OR asset_quantity)

asset_quantity.description: Asset units to buy/sell (use this OR quote_amount)

confirm.description: Set true to confirm and place the order (gateway may require this)

state.description: Filter by order state for list action (open, filled, canceled)

output.description: Order object or list of orders from Robinhood

rh-agentic-mcp.description: Paid proxy for Robinhood Agentic MCP — stocks, ETFs, and options. Get agentic_token via https://rh-wallet-production.up.railway.app/agentic/setup

agentic_token.description: Robinhood OAuth token — get via curl rh-connect.sh (see /agentic/setup)

method.description: MCP JSON-RPC method, e.g. tools/list, tools/call

params.description: MCP method parameters (tool name, arguments, etc.)

output.description: MCP JSON-RPC response from Robinhood Agentic

rh-buy.description: Bundled Robinhood Crypto buy/sell flow: fetch prices, check account buying power, then place the order — one payment instead of three separate calls.

rh_private_key_b64.description: Your Robinhood Ed25519 private key, base64-encoded

quote_amount.description: USD amount to spend/receive (use this OR asset_quantity)

asset_quantity.description: Asset units to buy/sell (use this OR quote_amount)

confirm.description: Must be true — places a real order after prices + account check

output.description: Combined response with prices, account, and order objects
